---
title: 'catalog push'
---

Push the active catalog's commits and annex content to its configured remotes.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog push
```

This command takes no command-specific options. Pair with `--no-sync` on
mutating commands (`add`, `remove`, `add-alias`, `remove-alias`) when batching
changes for a single explicit push.

## Example

```bash
xorq catalog add builds/f02d28198715 --no-sync
xorq catalog add-alias f02d28198715 prod --no-sync
xorq catalog push
```

## See also

- [`catalog pull`](pull.qmd)—pull from remotes
- [`catalog sync`](sync.qmd)—pull then push
